full_text:
Xiang Lang (Juda) 向朗 (巨達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiang Lang (向朗), styledJuda (巨達), was born in Yicheng in Xiangyang. Defended rear flank in the northern campaigns. Friend of Ma Su, didn’t report escape attempt. Xiang Lang was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Shu Kingdom. Xiang Lang lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
